creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some directories left over on uninstall,  which didn't occur before the change (non exhaustive list):

gcc11-11.5.0.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
gcc11-11.5.0.log:@dir share/info/gcc11
gcc12-12.4.0.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
gcc12-12.4.0.log:@dir share/info/gcc12
gcc13-13.3.0.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
gcc13-13.3.0.log:@dir share/info/gcc13
guile1-1.8.8_2.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
guile1-1.8.8_2.log:@dir share/info/guile1
guile2-2.2.7_6.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
guile2-2.2.7_6.log:@dir share/info/guile2
guile3-3.0.10.log:=>> Error: Files or directories left over:
guile3-3.0.10.log:@dir share/info/guile3
